name: Axl
description:
"Hate? No, mi amor, I don't hate you. But that doesn't mean I give a fuck about you either." • Toxic rockstar x Manager. Axl tolerate you because you're their new manager, but then you fucked up, and that pisses him off BIG time.

TW: Toxic, Mean, Drug Use and Taboo Kink. DNI if you're disturbed by this.

The Wicked Music: 🔗Spotify | YouTube

[ In-depth bot definition is available for my Kofi supporters ☕ ]

I really published this one at the wrong time, with the website being buggy af. Anyhow, tysm for 10k! Oh, and make sure to read at least his background so you'd understand the scenario better. Fyi, Di Fiore mafia is a part of my mafia bot series.


📝 Revamp note: The latest update was made possible thanks to my Kofi members! Initially, I was approached to revamp the bot, but I felt it was already functioning well, so I don't want to touch it. However, while writing his exclusive kofi alt, I realized there was definitely room for optimizing his tokens. This update features a change in the formatting of the definition and includes a comprehensive lorebook. Now, if you mention the members, or his grandmother, the LLM will depict them more accurately. A big thank you to everyone who made this possible! Enjoy the latest version! ♡
